name: Cronofy Calendar API
description: Cronofy provides a unified calendar synchronization API that connects to Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Apple iCloud, and Exchange calendars. Use this API to read and manage events, check availability, create scheduling links, send smart calendar invites, and receive push notifications for calendar changes.

capabilities.name: calendars_list
capabilities.description: List all calendars accessible to the authenticated user across all connected calendar accounts.

capabilities.name: calendars_create
capabilities.description: Create a new application-managed calendar within a connected calendar profile.

capabilities.name: events_read
capabilities.description: Read events from the authenticated user's calendars with filtering by date range, calendar IDs, and modification time.

capabilities.name: events_create
capabilities.description: Create or update an event in a specific calendar. Uses event_id for idempotent upsert behavior.

capabilities.name: events_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an event from a specific calendar by its event ID.

capabilities.name: events_bulk_delete
capabilities.description: Delete all events managed by your application from a user's calendars in a single request.

capabilities.name: events_freebusy
capabilities.description: Retrieve free/busy information for the authenticated user's calendars within a date range.

capabilities.name: availability_query
capabilities.description: Find available time slots across multiple participants' calendars within specified time windows. Supports grouping, required duration, and buffer times.

capabilities.name: availability_sequenced_query
capabilities.description: Find available time slots for a sequence of events that must happen in order, each with their own participants.

capabilities.name: real_time_scheduling_create
capabilities.description: Create a scheduling link that allows external users to book available time slots directly without calendar authorization.

capabilities.name: real_time_scheduling_disable
capabilities.description: Disable an active real-time scheduling link so it can no longer be used for booking.

capabilities.name: smart_invites_create
capabilities.description: Send a calendar invite to recipients and track their RSVP responses (accept, decline, tentative) without requiring calendar authorization.

capabilities.name: smart_invites_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status of a smart invite including recipient responses.

capabilities.name: smart_invites_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a previously sent smart invite and notify all recipients of the cancellation.

capabilities.name: channels_create
capabilities.description: Create a push notification channel to receive real-time updates when changes occur in the user's calendars.

capabilities.name: channels_list
capabilities.description: List all active push notification channels for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: channels_close
capabilities.description: Close an active push notification channel, stopping all future notifications on that channel.
